case_title: MIKHAIL LINETSKIY VS. BANK OF THE WEST

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY INNA KUPRIYANOVA AS RUSSIAN INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY HAZIM ELBGAL, BRANCH MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY INNA KUPRIYANOVA AS RUSSIAN INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY HAZIM ELBGAL, BRANCH MANAGER. IFP WAIVER GRANTED--NO COSTS.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,516.80 FILED BY LINETSKIY, MIKHAIL AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINETSKIY, MIKHAIL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-01-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LINETSKIY, MIKHAIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, PLAINTIFF SUFFERED SIGNIFICANT INCONVENIENCE AND EMOTIONAL DISTRESS RELATED TO DEFENDANT'S ERROR THROUGH NO FAULT OF THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF PARTIES TO NOV. 04, 2016 AT 1:30PM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2016 - JUDGMENT.
